title: Lance Namespace
description: A namespace is a hierarchical container for Lance tables, materialized views, and child namespaces. Backed by an external catalog (Hive, Polaris, Gravitino, Unity Catalog, AWS Glue) or by the Lance REST namespace server.

id.description: Fully-qualified namespace identifier as path segments.

properties.description: Implementation-defined key/value properties (owner, region, retention, etc.).
